scripts.build: if [ "$APP_TYPE" = "API" ]; then npm run build:api; else npm run build:admin; fi
scripts.build:admin: cd admin && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:api: cd api && npm install && npm run build
scripts.postbuild: if [ "$APP_TYPE" != "API" ]; then cp -r admin/.next . && cp -r admin/public . && cp admin/package.json . || echo 'Ambiente Windows'; fi
scripts.start: if [ "$APP_TYPE" = "API" ]; then node api/dist/main.js; else next start; fi
